releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog - Version 1.1.0 🚀

This release introduces a simplified, clutter-free workflow for converting Mermaid blocks to static images, direct PC exports, theme preservation, and visual alignment improvements.

## What's New

* ⚡ **URL-Based Conversion Flow**: Converts Mermaid blocks to static URLs hosted on **Kroki.io** or **Mermaid.ink**, preventing local file clutter in your vault.
* 🔁 **Seamless Diagram Restoration**: Instantly decodes and decompresses the original diagram source code directly from the image URL back into a standard editable code block (` ```mermaid `). No comments or file metadata are left behind in your notes.
* 💾 **Direct Image Downloads**: Added options in hover buttons, right-click context menu, and the Command Palette to download any active diagram (or converted remote diagram) directly to your PC as **SVG**, **PNG**, or **WebP**.
* 🎨 **Theme Matching**: Automatically preserves Obsidian's active light/dark theme styling when rendering or downloading diagrams.
* 📐 **Buttons Layout & Wrapping**: Solved misalignment issues in Live Preview and Reading Mode by dynamically wrapping converted remote images in an inline-block container, ensuring action buttons position perfectly relative to the boundaries of the image.
* ↩️ **Visual Icon Update**: Switched the restore action's icon to `history` (revert arrow) to easily differentiate it from Obsidian's native block code editor button.
* 🧪 **Spec-Focused Test Suite**: Completely refactored the test suite to validate user-facing plugin specifications (URL conversion logic, decompression/decoding, theme parsing, alt text slugifying) using mock editor interfaces.
* 📖 **Documentation Revamp**: Updated `README.md` to document the simplified URL flow, settings panel, direct downloads, and usage commands.
